title: BrickThrow
description: Simple and Messy Mod that makes bricks throwable. Throwing a bricks damages and briefly blinds mobs and players. It destroys glass windows.
body:
This Mod allows you to Throw default minecraft bricks like snowballs to break glass and damage entities, it also applies blindness effect to the player or mob it hits.
There's a 50% chance to retrieve the brick after throwing it.
That's pretty much it.
